args.command:
python3 -c "
import json,glob,os
f='reference/current_adaevolve_run/adaevolve_iteration_stats.jsonl'
print('exists',os.path.exists(f))
if os.path.exists(f):
    lines=open(f).read().splitlines()
    print('n',len(lines))
    for l in lines[-8:]:
        d=json.loads(l)
        it=d.get('iteration')
        g=d.get('global',{})
        cp=d.get('iteration_result',{}).get('child_program',{}).get('metrics',{})
        print(it, 'best',round(g.get('global_best_score',0),4),'child',round(cp.get('combined_score',0) if cp.get('combined_score') else 0,4))
"
